stemHtml: Because of overcast cloud, you are unable to climb above an altitude of 1000 feet over the sea, but you need to pass an urgent message to an aeronautical station by VHF. Assuming fuel is not a problem, there is no wind, and the signal has no attenuation factors, towards which of these stations should you fly to pass your message as soon as possible? A station…

options.a: 140 NM away whose antenna is at an elevation of 800 feet AMSL.
options.b: 120 NM away whose antenna is at an elevation of 200 feetAMSL.
options.c: 130 NM away whose antenna is at an elevation of 550 feet AMSL.
options.d: 110 NM away whose antenna is at an elevation of 30 feet AMSL.
